question: What withdrawal strategies does the engine support for funding retirement spending?
options: Per-Scenario choice: post-tax-first / tax-deferred-first / time-keyed blend schedule
Single optimal strategy computed by app
context: Depends on 9a5db500 (bracket tax model) and b10161a1 (RMDs). User wants the strategy to be a user-supplied per-Scenario input including a dynamic year-keyed blend (e.g. year 1: 80% post-tax, year 5: 62% post-tax, year 10: 90% tax-deferred).
